name: STACKIT Service Connection
description: Azure DevOps extension for STACKIT service connections with Workload Identity Federation (WIF) and Key Flow authentication

properties.name: stackit
properties.description: Authenticate to STACKIT using EXACTLY ONE of two methods: (1) Workload Identity Federation (WIF) with Service Account Name, or (2) Key Flow with Service Account Credentials JSON. Both fields cannot be empty or filled simultaneously. If misconfigured, the pipeline task will fail with a clear error message.

url.helpText: Base URL for STACKIT API (e.g., https://api.stackit.cloud)

inputDescriptors.name: Service Account Name
inputDescriptors.description: Name of the STACKIT service account (for WIF authentication). Leave empty if using Key Flow credentials instead.

inputDescriptors.name: Service Account Credentials (JSON)
inputDescriptors.description: Full JSON credentials from STACKIT service account (for Key Flow authentication). Leave empty if using WIF service account name instead. Copy and paste the entire JSON file.
